evals.prompt: I need to onboard a new charger manufacturer called 'EVBox' into the Shell Recharge admin portal. What fields do I need to fill in and where do I go?
evals.expected_output: Should explain navigating to Charge Station Make page, the Add tab, and list the required fields: Name, Short Name, Address (all required), plus optional Description. Should mention the URL pattern.

evals.prompt: We're setting up a new charging site at a parking garage in Amsterdam. Walk me through the complete setup process from scratch — we need a new location under our existing operator 'ShellNL' and enterprise 'Amsterdam-Central'. The site will have a site controller managing 4 DC fast chargers.
evals.expected_output: Should walk through: 1) Create Location (with all fields: address, geo, contacts, timezone, pricing, idle fees, facility type, commissioning), 2) Create SiteController (with peak capacity, energy specs, load management), 3) Register 4 Charge Stations (need ChargeBox IDs matching hardware). Should mention the cascading dropdown pattern and dependency order.

evals.prompt: What's the difference between the Price Plans in core-frontend and the Greenlots Fee / Price Groups in the legacy admin? When would I use each?
evals.expected_output: Should explain: Price Plans (core-frontend) are the modern versioned pricing system with Draft/Published workflow, scoped to Network Operator or Enterprise level. Greenlots Fee is the legacy fee configuration (flat/variable fees by payment mode and port type). Price Groups define pricing units (kWh/Session/Hourly) at the enterprise level. Should clarify the relationship and migration path.
